overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city plaza at night, featuring towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, neon-lit cylindrical pillars, and wet reflective pavement. The scene transitions from a narrow canyon between buildings to an open plaza and finally to a street intersection, with scattered pedestrians and palm trees visible throughout.

tall building with red and white structural elements and signage

building signage with the word SECTOR visible in white letters

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a dramatic upward view of a cyberpunk city canyon, surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in neon advertisements. The camera tilts down to street level, revealing wet reflective pavement and palm trees lining the pedestrian walkway.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a curved pedestrian path bordered by an orange-lit building on the left, passing benches where pedestrians sit. The cylindrical advertising pillars become visible in the distance ahead as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with cylindrical holographic advertising pillars

agents.ego_description: navigating through the open plaza weaving between the glowing cylindrical advertising pillars

tall cylindrical tower with rotating digital content and green neon trim

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza featuring massive cylindrical pillars wrapped in holographic advertisements that change colors from purple to yellow to red. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights as the camera weaves between the pillars toward the Fuyutsuki building visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with commercial buildings and crosswalk

events.description: exiting the plaza and approaching the street crosswalk near the Fuyutsuki building

agents.ego_description: approaching and beginning to cross the street intersection, navigating around other pedestrians

entered.detail: marked pedestrian crossing with yellow stripes on the wet asphalt
elevated walkway or monorail track crossing above the street
vertical signpost with circular symbol indicating traffic regulations

segments.scene_description: Leaving the plaza behind, the camera approaches a street intersection with the Fuyutsuki building now prominent on the right. Pedestrians gather at the crosswalk as the camera moves toward the intersection, with an overhead bridge visible in the distance and the cylindrical pillars receding behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, towering urban canyon into a wide, neon-lit plaza that eventually opens onto a busy street intersection. It begins with a dramatic upward tilt toward skyscrapers draped in neon advertisements before descending to reveal wet, reflective pavement and palm trees lining a pedestrian walkway. As the camera moves forward along a curved path bordered by an orange-lit building and resting pedestrians, the view expands to reveal massive cylindrical advertising pillars in the distance. The scene then opens into a wide plaza where the camera weaves between these pillars as their holographic displays shift from purple to yellow and red, reflecting vividly off the damp ground. Finally, the camera leaves the plaza behind and approaches a street intersection with the Fuyutsuki building prominent on the right and an overhead bridge visible in the distance.
